svg.title: Hold'em capability over time
svg.desc: Best-so-far avg_utility_model in fixed-limit chips per hand against the tight-turn-river-exact-pot-odds e8 gate, using real git commit timestamps. Data: 2026-05-18T08:14:14-07:00 83a65be 0.0000 pre-Hold'em gate, 2026-05-18T09:30:45-07:00 7211b2b 0.0000 first Hold'em policy baseline, 2026-05-19T03:13:49-07:00 e228875 +0.0077 tuned exact policy, 2026-05-19T04:51:12-07:00 c760f0a +0.4455 range-aware rule policy, 2026-05-19T05:52:39-07:00 3344aef +0.5073 current-best neural policy, 2026-05-20T15:34:22-07:00 7822c7a +0.5073 current best unchanged after gated calibration probe, 2026-05-20T15:49:41-07:00 b578227 +0.5073 current best unchanged after MCCFR averaging fix, 2026-05-20T15:59:09-07:00 7dc75b6 +0.5073 current best unchanged after 20k MCCFR probe, 2026-05-20T16:06:39-07:00 dad765f +0.5073 current best unchanged after reach-support MCCFR probe, 2026-05-20T16:15:30-07:00 2cbb728 +0.5073 current best unchanged after cap-2 MCCFR range-gate failure, 2026-05-20T16:45:30-07:00 83a6961 +0.5073 current best unchanged after cap-2 fallback sweep rejection, 2026-05-20T17:01:11-07:00 95a7258 +0.5073 current best unchanged after MCCFR response-distill probe, 2026-05-20T17:06:49-07:00 81c5eb5 +0.5073 current best unchanged after call-weighted MCCFR response-distill probe, 2026-05-20T17:17:29-07:00 e82d291 +0.5073 current best unchanged after p1 MCCFR response-composite probes, 2026-05-20T17:26:42-07:00 cc3a84e +0.5073 current best unchanged after p1 facing-response blend probe, 2026-05-20T17:42:48-07:00 8ce9081 +0.5073 best unchanged after value400 p0 plus after-two calibration probe.
svg.text: Best-so-far fixed-limit chip EV vs tight-turn-river-exact-pot-odds e8; x-axis uses real git commit times

g.text: failed robustness probes stay in the table, not the capability line
